hyperedges.label: SettingsScreen navigation router pattern
hyperedges.description: SettingsScreen acts as a client-side router: CategoryRow taps set view state, and each view renders a SubScreen wrapper — all three together implement the drill-down navigation pattern

hyperedges.label: Security sub-system: 2FA + password + sessions
hyperedges.description: All five components together implement the full security management flow: password change with confirmation, 2FA enable/disable lifecycle, and per-device session revocation

hyperedges.label: Global window store access pattern
hyperedges.description: useSettingsData reads all four global window stores (__mtxProfile, __mtxIsPremium, __mtxOnboarding, __mtxAuth) and re-renders on mtx:profile-changed event — these five nodes form the settings data layer
